review_title: Threat free browsing environment facilitation tool
description: It has powerful security monitoring tools that detects threats that can affect workflows. It has blocked many ransomware attacks that could destroy confidential data and expose company secrets to third parties.
author: James R.
pros: The cyber attack response automated system safeguards our data from malware attacks. BrowseControl provides real-time insights on security situation from workloads. It has simple configuration procedure with other applications that saves time and resources for entire implementation process.
cons: I have not discovered performance weaknesses from the operation protocol of this platform.

review_title: A Comprehensive and Feature-Rich Web Filtering Solution
description: Overall, BrowseControl is an excellent web filtering solution for businesses of all sizes. It offers a wide range of features that make it easy to configure and manage the system. However, the cost may be prohibitive for smaller organizations with limited budgets.
author: Javier G.
pros: BrowseControl is an excellent web filtering solution that provides a comprehensive range of features to help businesses keep their networks secure. It has an intuitive user interface that makes it easy to set up and manage the product. The filtering rules are highly intuitive and customizable, making it easy to configure the system to meet the specific needs of the organization. Furthermore, the reporting and analytics features provide invaluable insight into user browsing activity, making it easy to monitor and enforce web usage policies.
cons: The main downside of BrowseControl is its cost. While the product is fairly priced for the features it offers, it may be too expensive for smaller businesses with limited budgets. Additionally, some of the features are a bit tricky to configure, so it may be beneficial to have a dedicated IT team to manage the system.

description: The system works very well. Features like being able to provide a custom block screen are great. Being able to rename the system from the actual PC name helps to better identify the system in the admin interface. You can create a custom installer for client systems. It's easy to update the client settings, and to import settings from an existing client to a new one.
author: Ethan C.
pros: The software is easy to distribute to client systems.
cons: The administrative software can be slow and a little bit cumbersome. The list of systems is missing a search or an easy way to filter the full list of installed systems. This may have changed with the newer web based interface.

description: I am really lucky to find this out. COOL one. Kudos to developers.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Easy to install in Server and Client Workspace. Its a Web based application, has lot of features like allowing or disallowing the internet access at the scheduled time and lot more.
cons: I feel like its a complete feature rich software already, sufficient for Small and Mid Scale companies.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Since going live with BrowseControl, the number of requests that have come in about the "blocking" software not working has decreased dramatically. Before, it was almost a daily issue, and now it happens every now and then. This is fixed by restarting the Client Service.
author: Jude M.
pros: BrowseControl is very simple to setup, and it is very easy to install on the client's computer. Also, the ongoing administration of the devices is easy to maintain.
cons: The password keeps getting reset to the default value on our client's computers. This is a little concerning overall, but this is not a threat with our current client base.

description: Internet security has been great challenge for all the enterprise but after deployment of this platform we have experienced positive changes. Data exchange and secure browsing has been enhanced with efficient security controls.
author: Bryson H.
pros: It prevents members in the organization from visiting vulnerable areas in the internet. Browse control tests authenticity of browsers before operations. It provides alerts when there are data threats that can affect workflows.
cons: This is powerful product that I highly count in enhancing browsing safety.

author: Evana W.
pros: I recently switched to BrowseControl for our company's web filtering and I couldn't be happier. The set up process was fast and easy, the features are comprehensive, and the support team is always available to help with any issues we have. Plus, it's a great value for the money since they offer competitive packages that meet our needs.
cons: The administrative software may have some performance issues and lagging. Aside from these concerns, I have no other complaints. Overall, it's very straightforward.

review_title: Software that Punches above it's weight
description: the purchase and on boarding process was very smooth and customer support is very efficient . I had an executive who helped with the renewals although it was a non working day in his country , I would recommend it to anybody.
author: Anoop P.
pros: The software is easy to install and was cheap to purchase and Cost wise very high ROI. What we especially like about the product is the ease of report generation and monitoring such that it could be taught to no technical staff like the HR executive for instance. It required very less resources and licensing model is simple
cons: Interfaces although easy to use feels a bit outdated

review_title: Full Control over App and Internet Usage at Par
description: By blocking access to high risk websites, we reduce financial risks.
author: Jamie S.
pros: BrowseControl categorize web contents to ensure they comply with our internet use policies.
cons: Doesn’t incorporate all endpoint security tools such as dark web monitoring tools.

description: A few months ago we decided to try this platform because we already use other of their products for work and we were really surprised by its performance, it has allowed us to detect many irregular behaviors in the workstations and block malicious sites and possible dangerous file downloads.
author: Aeryn B.
pros: I like it because I can monitor our employees and keep them from being distracted. It allowed us to block video and social networking sites that some employees were using. It allows us to quickly block unauthorized downloads by our security protocols.
cons: There is nothing I dislike about this software.

description: We have used other web filtering and block programs before and CurrentWare has been the best for us and at a great price. Some of our workstations work via VPN and once the agent is installed it still does what we want.
author: Ken W.
pros: The software actually does what was advertised and the support is great same day! We were able to have the software up and running on the same day with no issues or even a call/email to their support. We are able to have the control over web access on either the hardware level or user level. We chose user level since our users move from workstation to workstation. Plus we are able to create user groups that define a level of access and move the users between them as needed.
cons: The only Con that comes to mind is sometime while upgrading the license needs to be reapplied. Not a big issue but only con I have.

description: BrowseControl doesn’t grant access to websites that go against out computer policies.
author: Philip S.
pros: I like how BrowseControl filter website contents to ensure they are compliant with our policies.
cons: Thanks to Currentware, I seldom encounter issues when using BrowseControl.

review_title: BrowseControl and a very Secure Data Management Package.
description: BrowseControl is the effective Cloud system to migrate data and other information management and easy on data analytics creation.
author: Valarie V.
pros: BrowseControl is a professional data flow management platform with secure environment for easy project data management. The simplicity is effective and the easy to manage big data across Cloud services is excellent and the reports are very accurate.
cons: No issues on BrowseControl and the features configuration and the training on its basic usability is excellent.

author: Emma M.
pros: I recently started using BrowseControl to better manage my team's web browsing and it has been a godsend. The software is very user friendly, allowing me to easily customize internet restriction policies for each user or department with granular control. It also allows me to block websites based on URLs and categories which is great for controlling the content my team can access.
cons: For someone who is not tech-savvy and not properly trained to use this, it can be challenging to navigate through the platform.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Al L.
pros: BrowseControl ensures that our internal network is secure with its high-end network monitoring infrastructure.
cons: BrowseControl should have a native MAC version which would be definitely useful for us.

description: Very good experience and the support is very quick.
author: james B.
pros: I love that there is always new features that get added, The product has improved so much over the last 12 months with these features. Easy to use once you know way around it. Quick to block websites. Cost
cons: Would love to see a username option added as when trying to unblock a website for user i have to go by computername, which i have to find out.

review_title: Browse Control is a time saver!
author: Scott S.
pros: This software was easy to install and customize to our needs. Within minutes we had it up and running with a clear understanding of all the basic tools. Category Filtering is such a time saver and of course saving time is saving money!
cons: The only con I have is not finding it sooner!

review_title: Great Software for Whitelist only web filtering
author: Evan S.
pros: The console we host here will instantly update all agents on over 100 remote machines in seconds
cons: Client side to disable filtering can be a bit clunky, if you stop the currentware service, it will disable. Rebooting brings everything back up.

review_title: The best Browser control tool out there
author: Eromonsele E.
pros: This really helped manage network bandwidth in our head office by controlling and providing visibility into how the bandwidth was consumed. We were able to implement controls that optimized business productivity and from our results it was evident.
cons: Well, I feel reporting can be a more optimized

author: Kai F.
pros: It’s easy to use. It does the job. I makes my job easier.
cons: Not too much that I would say I like the least about it

author: Roger G.
pros: Management interface is intuitive and flexible
cons: No cons have been discovered so far, as the implementation was 2 months ago
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Controlled Internet Access And Help To Focus on What Matters
description: Limiting access to particular websites or material, helps organizations comply with legal requirements and industry standards. It aids businesses in reducing the danger of malware infections, data breaches, and unauthorized access to private data. Limiting excessive online browsing makes sure that vital apps have access to enough network resources.
author: Diksha S.
pros: It enables businesses to impose time limits on web browsing, avoiding excessive use of the internet for personal use. Businesses can optimize bandwidth usage and guarantee that key apps have enough resources by regulating web browsing. It gives businesses information about how their workers use the internet, enabling them to see and resolve any issues with abuse or compliance. Businesses might design specialized online usage guidelines based on their own requirements and demands.
cons: To ensure efficient filtering as web content changes, policies need to be periodically evaluated and modified. Regular updates and assistance from the software supplier are necessary for it to function effectively.

review_title: Effective Web Access Management Solutions To Ensure Productive Internet Usage
description: It is an important tool for guaranteeing efficient and secure internet access due to its strong web filtering, user controls, and time-based limits. It is especially helpful for companies, educational institutions, and government agencies trying to ensure efficient internet usage and safeguard users from hazardous or disruptive information. Because of how simple it is to operate, IT staff members spend less time learning it.
author: Sakshi C.
pros: By limiting access to potentially risky or malicious websites, it can help improve network security and lower the risk of cyberattacks. Even during times of high usage, it guarantees a seamless browsing experience for all users. We can achieve a balance between online activities and other significant factors by imposing time limits on internet use.
cons: It would be more user-friendly if remote management choices were made simpler. Some complex customization choices can need technical know-how, which could be difficult for administrators without that knowledge.

review_title: All-Inclusive Platform To Limit Access To Dangerous Websites
description: It enhances ongoing web content categorization and separation to prevent high-risk and diverting networks. It screens website content to make sure it adheres to our policies. The in-depth reports are quite helpful. The purchasing and onboarding processes were both very seamless, and customer support is superb.
author: Rahul K.
pros: It is an all-inclusive platform for managing the organization's devices, security, and network. It can be set up to permit or prohibit Internet access at different times and devices. The detailed reports are incredibly helpful, and the setup is fairly simple. Both updating client settings and importing settings from an older client into a new client are simple processes.
cons: It could be advantageous to have a professional IT team to manage the system because some of the functions are a little difficult to configure. I don't have anything else to complain about, though.

review_title: Browse control as part of our security solution
description: We use Browse control and other CurrentWare products as an essential part of our security practices. I like the product, and it works great. We have utilized CurrentWare for the last eight years, and I've no complaints. Responsive support and willing to take feedback and suggestions. Highly recommended
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Browsing control settings per user with URL white and black lists. File download control
cons: File download control wouldn't work with HTTPS. Doesn't have the ability to request to open a site on the block page, like an unblock button which will trigger an email to the admin, it does include an email link on pages that are within the blocked URL list but not for those in blocked categories
